claims.name: Thurstonian seed-to-seed r
claims.statement: Pearson correlation between Thurstonian utilities fit from two independent active-learning runs on the default Gemma-3-27B persona (gemma3_10k_run1 vs gemma3_3k_run2; 1961 overlapping task_ids). Interpreted in the paper as a seed-to-seed reliability estimate for the utility-extraction pipeline.

claims.name: Thurstonian seed-to-seed overlap count
claims.statement: 1961 task_ids appear in both Gemma-3-27B active-learning runs used for the Thurstonian seed-to-seed reliability estimate.
